title: BA9 9DP, Japan Environmental Development and Investment UK Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/FP3628SH/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Japan Environmental Development and Investment UK Limited   Installation name: Brains Farm Anaerobic Digestion Facility   Permit number: EPR/FP3628SH/A001   "
